name: Logwick
description: The audit log for AI agents. Query logs, get stats, and ingest log entries via natural language.

LOGWICK_API_KEY.description: Your Logwick API key from logwick.io/dashboard

tools.name: ingest_log
tools.description: Log an AI agent action to Logwick.

tools.name: get_stats
tools.description: Get usage stats — success rate, tokens, cost.

tools.name: get_log
tools.description: Get full details of a single log entry by ID.

tools.name: delete_log
tools.description: Delete a log entry by ID.
